feed.title: SAP Community - NW ABAP Gateway (OData)
feed.subtitle: NW ABAP Gateway (OData) Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: BTP UI5 Application Connecting to on-premise SAP OData service
entry.content:
Hi All,

We have requirement to development an UI5 Application that retrieve/post data to On-Premise SAP system using OData Services(through Cloud Connector). Here BTP UI5 application users are not exist in SAP On-premise system. 

So, we need to use Basic Authentication to connect with SAP System using Technical user. Is this a good practice use basic authentication or do we have any other option setup connectivity with OAuth or any other best practice follow here.

Please suggest.

Regards,

Satya

entry.title: How to modify OData payload date from this //\/Date(1708041600000)\/ to "20240217" in sap SEGW.
entry.content:
Hi masters , 

i have created a OData v2 project from SEGW (1809 ), which has only two fields Kunnr and TransDate.

Kunnr data type is kunnr & TransDare data type DATUM in structure/Table.

Kunnr data type is EDmString & TransDare data type Edm.DateTime in segw with ref to structure.

now i want to craete new record from the OData service using postman.

when i try to pass my preload along with csrf key.

it throughs an error like Conversion error for property 'TransDate' at offset '57' 

{
    "Kunnr" : "1900097",
    "TransDate" : "20240217"
}
But when i pass below payload  data get created but requriment is to pass date like "20240217" its mandatory formate without any compromise.
{
    "Kunnr" : "1900097",
    "TransDate" : "\/Date(1708041600000)\/"
}
How do i acheive this please help me out.
 
ABAP RESTful Application Programming Model logging of Web Dynpro for ABAP SAP BTP, ABAP environment SAP NetWeaver Application Server for ABAP OData NW ABAP Gateway (OData) 
@Sap @abap1 @SAPSupport @SAPABAP

entry.title: Missing key components during redefinition processs
entry.content:
Hi all,
I am trying to redefine the standard Odata service FDP_BD_STANDARD_CH_OP. During the process of redefinition I have noticed that the key fields are missing in the selection screen.

Here is one of the examples:

 

Why are the key fields not available during the redefinition process?

Best regards

entry.title: Periodic report for number of concurrent users in SAP.
entry.content:
Hi Team,

We want to get the number of concurrent users periodically in SAP. Is there any SAP report which can provide this detail periodically? 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

entry.title: SAP Build Apps - POST CALL not working in backend
entry.content:
SAP Build Apss

Issue : POST operation not working when we make a call from SAP build apps. Getting the below error :

 

 

Although when we click on REPLAY button then the POST operation works as expected and the data is created as required.

i have used Odata integration . this entity set is used to create data in backend. 

 

Logic for the submit button to create data :

entry.title: auth. object to restrict access to global data/ client level
entry.content:
An authorization object needs to be applied to several roles.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: CAP or RAP
entry.content:
Hi Experts,


I'm a SAP ABAP developer, I well trained in SAP UI5, OData and ABAP. For my future career opportunities what should I choose CAP or RAP which is going to be enlarged in future business perceptions. 

Need your advice. Thanks in advance.

entry.title: ODATA calls - SAP Background process
entry.content:
Hello All,

When you call ODATA from front end applications (like SAP UI5 or external application), which work processes were used by SAP?

Thanks,

Ram.

entry.title: change company name & address
entry.content:
Hi Sap
my company has change name and address.

so i want to change that for all users in system


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: GET method is being called after POST method - SAP Gateway API with RFCs
entry.content:
Hi,

I have created a new API with both GET_ENTITY and CREATE methods, mapped to two different RFC function modules. When I try to test the POST method to create a new entry, after the CREATE RFC, the GET_ENTITY RFC is being called. Because of which I'm not able to get the return messages from POST method.

May I know how can I correct this?

Thank you for your help.

Regards,

Kishore

entry.title: BAPI_USER_CHANGE under CUA environment
entry.content:
Hello SAP

We are trying to change user password by FM( BAPI_USER_CHANGE ).  Our SAP system is running on CUA environment. We have checked restrictions of this FM under CUA.  No special restriction were found. 

I thought changing initial password will lead changing password of users on child system. Changing anohter item like first name & last name will lead to changing those of user on child system. However nothing happened as we expected. So we didn't specified target child system.

Why anything happen ? Is ther any restriction for Functional Module under CUA environment ?

 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: How to change log retention period about User Change Documents in sap hana
entry.content:
Dear SAP,

I wonder if there is a way to change the log retention period for permissions and profile items that are output when inquiring user change documents through transaction SUIM.

Whether it can be easily changed through setting,
Please check if we need to develop a program that deletes data from a specific table and if there is any other way, please let us know.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: ABAP Integration with FastAPI for File Uploads: Seeking Code Guidance
entry.content:
Problem Statement:

I am working on integrating an ABAP system with a FastAPI server to upload files via HTTP POST requests. I have a FastAPI endpoint set up to receive file uploads, and I need assistance with creating the ABAP code to send a file to this endpoint.

Description:

  1. FastAPI Endpoint: I have a FastAPI endpoint (POST /upload/) set up to receive file uploads. The endpoint expects the file to be included in the body of the request.

  2. ABAP System: On the ABAP side, I need to write code that reads a file from the filesystem and sends it to the FastAPI endpoint via an HTTP POST request.

Requirements:

  1. HTTP POST Request: The ABAP code should construct an HTTP POST request to the FastAPI endpoint.

  2. Multipart Form Data: The file should be sent as multipart form data in the body of the POST request.

    curl -X POST -F "file=@data.json" https://endpoint.cfapps.us10-001.hana.ondemand.com/upload/ This curl works on vscode or command prompt. I want to achieve same from ABAP. 

    Server accepts data file containing JSON, does processing and returns JSON. Sever side is python.
    #if_http_client #abap #btp #httprequests #fileuploads #Post @Tomas_Buryanek I saw your answer for similar query on image upload to servicenow. Kindly help with this, seeking your expertise.

    Regards,
    Naveen

entry.title: SAP oDarta SEGW Deep Entity vs Changeset
entry.content:
Good day

We have a simple table in Fiori where the user can select a few rows and click on the post button, we are sending it as batch from the frontend and on the backend we need to post all the entries at once to a bapi. There is no nested structures, all entries are posted to one BAPI. We are using segw for the oData. For this scenario would it be better to use Deep Entity or ChangeSet? Currently we are using a create entity but it is calling the bapi for each row, we want to call the bapi with data from all rows selected

entry.title: Error "OData Server return 401 - Unauthorized error" / Browser is not configured to using SPNego
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

Could you please help/support on the below error. Recently we have been facing an issue when accessing the SAP Hybrid App in IPAD, After the successful authentication when the call goes to gateway system we are getting this error. More details on the error 

Error "Retrieve metadata failed - OData Server return 401 - Unauthorized error" /

Your Browser is not configured to using SPNego

The connections is via SAP BTP and we are seeing the same error logs in cloud platform. But I am not able to see any logs in gateways system.

Kindly let me know or help me to fix this issue. This is very urgent

entry.title: Fiori elements SEGW, when user selects the select all button, it only selects the data on page
entry.content:
Good day

We are using a Fiori elements app with SEGW oData get entityset in the backend, when a user selects the select all button on Fiori, it only selects the data on the page, as the user clicks on load more the new data that shows is not selected. The user wants to select all the data and do a posing.

.

As the user scrolls down, new data is loaded as unselected and the select all button is automatically unticked

entry.title: generate XSD-File (XML Schema) for ODATA-Service
entry.content:
Hi experts! 

I added a SAP Standard API/Service API_CUSTOMER_RETURN_SRV (Transaction /IWFND/MAINT_SERVICE) in our SAP on-prem S/4 System. Now I need to create a XSD-File for this service but I couldn't find an answer how to do this.

does anyone know, how I can create a XSD-File in S/4?

Thanks and regards, Sebastian

entry.title: Passing reference/dynamic subtable through OData GET_EXPANDED_ENTITYSET
entry.content:
Hello guys,

I'm using the OData GET_EXPANDED_ENTITYSET method to pass data through OData to some frontend FIORI app. I did this several times so I'm known with the concept, but this time it's getting a bit tricky.

I have the following type definition which should be my final entityset at the end.

  TYPES:
    BEGIN OF ty_s_psp_data.
      INCLUDE TYPE ts_pspdetail.
    TYPES:
      pspbudget TYPE TABLE OF ts_pspbudget WITH NON-UNIQUE DEFAULT KEY,
      pspplan   TYPE REF TO data,
      pspobligo TYPE TABLE OF ts_pspobligo WITH NON-UNIQUE DEFAULT KEY,
      pspist    TYPE TABLE OF ts_pspist    WITH NON-UNIQUE DEFAULT KEY,
    END OF ty_s_psp_data .

The problem now is the pspplan subtable which is a data reference because I have to create this table at runtime. I'm using RTTS definitions to create and fill this data and it works fine at the end I have this table of type ty_s_psp_data with 4 subtables in it. The problem now is because of TYPE REF TO data pspplan is only a data reference. My method is working fine but outside of it I'm getting error in Gateway protocol:

It gives me exception of type CX_ST_SERIALIZATION_ERROR and says that I cant use reference type obviously because of my pspplan subtable. How can I fix this? I have to create this table at runtime. Is it possible to pass it through the OData Service or without using data reference?

Regards
Michael

entry.title: SAP Gateway Project Extn/Redefinition - Issue with call to extension
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

We have a common requirement to extend standard SAP gateway project and redefine couple of DPC extension class methods to add some additional logic to the standard one. We could do that, but when we are calling the standard UI5 application, it does not make call extension project DPC classes though we are using the standard OData Service with/without redefinition.

System version: SAP S/4HANA 2022 FPS 02.

To achieve the same, we have extended a standard Gateway Project /SCWM/PACK_OUTBDLV using a Redefine Service option into a custom one ZSCWM_PACK_OUTBDLV. We have generated the classes(DPC, DPC ext, MPC, MPC ext, Model and service) and did not  create any new OData service as we would like to use the standard OData service.

 

In the custom DPC extn class, we have redefined the method: VALIDATEACTIONSE_CREATE_ENTITY in to perform some pre and post calculations. 

Now, when I am calling the standard Ui5 project, it does not go into the extended gateway project DPC extension class, it is just going to standard class.

Its a simple requirement, but it does not work as expected. Was searching in SAP help and blogs, there is no information available to solve the issue.

What could be issue here, what am I missed here?

Thank you in advance.

 

Kind regards

entry.title: Error "Resource not found for the segment 'mergeId'" in SAP S/4 HANA Cloud Public Edition
entry.content:
Hello, 

I am working on SAP S4 HANA Cloud Public Edition version 2402, and I am reaching you for help regarding an error that is displayed when I try to access Fiori application "Manage launchpad spaces".

The error text: "Resource not found for the segment 'mergeId'"

I checked first if this is related to an authorization issue, but this is not the case because both business catalog "SAP_CORE_BC_UI_FLD" and business role "SAP_BR_ADMINISTRATOR" are assigned to my user. Also, I can successfully open fiori application "Manage Launchpad pages" (which requires the same "authorizations" as the fiori app "Manage Launchpad spaces") 

  • Thus, since I can successfully access fiori application "Manage Launchpad pages" but not able to call "Manage Launchpad spaces", I do not think this is an authorization issue.

I called fiori application "Odata Error log" and I see the following details:

  • Error: "Resource not found for the segment 'mergeId'
  • Service name: FDM_SPACE_REPOSITORY_CUST_SRV
  • ABAP Component: CA-FLP-ABA
  • ABAP Package: /IWCOR/SODATA_CORE
  • Request URI: /sap/opu/odata/UI2/FDM_SPACE_REPOSITORY_CUST_SRV/$batch?sap-client=100

What can I do to correct the issue ?

Should I contact SAP since this is the cloud Public Edition and I have no access to the gateway?

Also the SAP Note "1797736" did not help
